hooks.command: node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c); process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const o=JSON.parse(d); const f=o.tool_input&&o.tool_input.file_path||o.tool_response&&o.tool_response.filePath||''; if(f) process.stdout.write(f);});" | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && npx prettier --write "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
